subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, the Sovereign of earth and heaven, the One True Object of Quest, the Peerless Object of Worship, Who in all conditions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد خدا را مالک ارض و سما را مقصود یکتا را معبود بیهمتا را که در جمیع احوال
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for assistance; intercession, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
